title: SigNoz Ingestion Key
description: Schema representing an ingestion key used to authenticate telemetry data sent to SigNoz.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ingestion key.

name.description: Human-readable name for the ingestion key.

value.description: The actual API key value used for authentication.

orgId.description: Organization identifier this key belongs to.

limits.description: Rate limiting configuration for this ingestion key.

bytesPerSecond.description: Bytes per second limit for log ingestion.
Bytes per second limit for trace ingestion.
Bytes per second limit for metric ingestion.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the ingestion key was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the ingestion key was last updated.
